meta.title: DotaClassic — Real Dota 2
meta.description: Original patches, old map, live online. Download the launcher and start playing today.

hero.subtitle: Old patches, the old map, the very Dota as you remember it. Without overcomplicated meta and shaders covering half the screen.

howItWorks.title: How to start playing
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. You already have Steam — nothing else needed.
howItWorks.step1Text: One installer. It will pull the client you need — we won't touch your original Dota 2.
howItWorks.step2Text: The launcher will automatically pick up your account from the running Steam — no need to enter separate logins or passwords.
howItWorks.step3Text: Pick a mode, find a match, play. Five minutes from launch to the first creep.

patches.title: Patch rotation
patches.subtitle: We periodically change available versions. Here's what's coming:
patches.season684cDesc: Balance patch where the classic Dota started on new servers.
patches.season684dDesc: Active season — servers are running, matches are happening.
patches.nextPatchDesc: Something new is being prepared. Stay tuned.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes. We use original Dota 2 clients, and the matchmaking and servers are our own — Valve is not involved in this scheme.
faq.q2: Can my Steam account be banned?
faq.a2: No. Games run on our servers, VAC can't reach them. A ban is only possible if you bring your own cheats — but that's not on the launcher.
faq.q3: What operating systems does it work on?
faq.a3: Windows — natively. On Linux and macOS — via Wine/Proton.
faq.a4: Old Dota 2 ran on Source 1 and was noticeably lighter than the current version. A dual-core processor from 2.8 GHz, 4 GB of RAM, and a video card like GeForce 8600/9600 GT or Radeon HD 2600/3600 is enough.
faq.q5: What happens to my original Dota 2?
faq.a5: Nothing. The launcher installs a separate client — the original Dota is in no way connected to the old one and coexists peacefully.
faq.nudge: Can't find your question? Ask in

finalCta.title: Time to come back
finalCta.subtitle: Download the launcher and start playing now. You only need Steam.

embed.title: Play old Dota online
embed.description: Dota2Classic is the only way to play the old Dota from 2015. Here you can relive that very game. Old patch, dota old patch.
